patientInfo.title: Patient Information
patientInfo.subtitle: Everything you need to know before your visit.

items.item1: Bring a valid photo ID and insurance card
items.item2: Arrive 15 minutes early to complete paperwork
items.item3: Bring a list of current medications
items.item4: Bring any relevant imaging (X-rays, MRI scans)
items.item6: Prepare a list of questions for the doctor
items.item7: Arrange transportation if sedation is planned
items.item8: Fast for 8 hours if instructed for pre-operative visit

item3.name: Referral Letter
item3.description: From your primary care physician (if required by insurance)

item4.name: Medical Records
item4.description: Previous treatment records related to your condition

item5.name: Imaging Results
item5.description: X-rays, MRI, or CT scans on CD or digital format

insurance.title: Insurance & Payment
insurance.description: We accept most major insurance plans. Please contact our office to verify your coverage.
insurance.selfPayDesc: We offer competitive self-pay rates and flexible payment plans. Contact our billing department for details.
